title: RF elements STH-A45-USMA Asymmetrical antenna StarterHorn, 45°, USMA, 5GHz, 17dBi

description: StarterHorn antenna from RF elements is an asymmetric sector antenna with a gain of 17 dBi , with a beam angle of 30°/45° and can be installed on a holder or mast with a diameter 20 to 55 mm . This antenna offers the perfect combination of features and functions that address the major weaknesses of today's mainstream sector antennas. The StarterHorn A45 USMA has zero side lobes, ensuring efficient use of the spectrum.
